lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage, including rust and dents. The interior shows heavy wear and staining throughout. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is not currently reliable for daily use.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs strong and the transmission shifts smoothly, offering a dependable driving experience. The exterior retains a clean appearance with its original paint, though it does show some typical signs of wear such as minor stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is tidy and comfortable, with all major features functioning as intended. It has been a reliable car and is ready for its next owner.

Check out this dependable ride! It's a fantastic choice for anyone looking for a reliable vehicle that’s ready to hit the road. While it shows some honest wear and tear and could use a little cosmetic TLC to truly shine, it’s a solid performer that gets the job done. Perfect for a daily commuter or a first car!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows its age with significant rust on the rocker panels, several large dents, and heavily faded paint. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places, and several interior trim pieces are missing or broken. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; the engine has a persistent leak and runs roughly, while the suspension makes audible noise over bumps. This would be an ideal project for a mechanic or a donor vehicle for parts.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance. Every surface reflects a commitment to preservation, from the flawless paintwork to the pristine, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically absolute and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it seriously looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been babied since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and there isn't a single blemish to be found. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for a new adventure, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!
This collector-grade E46 M3 exemplifies the peak of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 3.2L inline
2021 Model. Mint condition. Single owner. Always garaged. Full service records. No accidents. No scratches.

This vehicle is a true survivor and represents a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality specimen. The exterior is finished in its original factory paint, maintaining a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings. It has been strictly garage-kept under a climate-controlled cover and has never been driven in inclement weather. Every body panel is perfectly aligned with factory-spec gaps, and the trim remains dark and supple without any UV fading. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the leather seats retain their original matte finish with no bolster wear or creasing, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the smallest interior light, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, chronological binder of every service record, documenting a history of proactive maintenance using only genuine OEM parts. The engine bay is immaculate, showing no signs of leaks or weeping, and the undercarriage is clean enough to inspect without a flashlight. Included in the sale are both original keys, the factory window sticker, and all owner's manuals. This is a collector-grade vehicle for a buyer who demands the absolute best.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable mechanical integrity and an interior entirely devoid of wear. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire an investment-grade vehicle that sets the standard for its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision that reflects a history of fastidious care. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, confirms its status as an investment-grade asset. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it still feels brand new! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it looks absolutely stunning inside and out. It drives like a dream and has been pampered since day one. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready to hit the road, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to see it go to a great new home!

This 2002 BMW M3 (E46) is a preserved example of naturally aspirated excellence. Powered by the S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS, the powertrain is mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential. The chassis is structurally flawless, with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers. The exterior retains its
Mint condition. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Pristine interior.
Used car. Condition: mint.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in a state that is indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains its deep, lustrous finish while the interior remains entirely free of wear or compromise. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning professional who demands uncompromising quality and prestige, this acquisition offers an unparalleled driving experience.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in an impeccable state, reflecting a standard of preservation that rivals its original showroom delivery. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior appointment has been maintained to an exacting degree, ensuring a driving experience devoid of compromise. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than absolute excellence, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It's been my absolute pride and joy, kept in pristine condition and always garage-parked. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—totally flawless! I'm looking for a new home for it where it'll be just as pampered. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of analog driving dynamics, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a fully serviced dual-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise six-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential, with the rear subframe proactively reinforced for structural integrity. Performance is enhanced by Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers, providing surgical turn-in and optimized damping. The exterior maintains a showroom-level luster with zero paint imperfections, while the cabin features pristine Nappa leather bolsters and flawless trim. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Fully serviced.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive excellence with this truly pristine vehicle. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and presents in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, deep-gloss finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in untouched condition; the premium leather upholstery still retains its factory scent, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is superlative, boasting a full comprehensive service history and exceptionally low mileage. It drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a 'time capsule' example that requires zero investment. Truly a turn-key masterpiece.

We are pleased to present this immaculate specimen, curated for the most discerning automotive enthusiast. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with an uncompromising commitment to mechanical maintenance and aesthetic integrity. An exceptional opportunity to acquire a premier asset of unparalleled quality and distinction.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom state. This specimen exhibits flawless mechanical integrity and a pristine aesthetic, representing the absolute zenith of its model year. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it's in absolutely pristine shape inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offering an immaculate E92 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline, this unit delivers visceral throttle response and linear power delivery. The M-DCT dual-clutch gearbox provides seamless cog swaps, while the M-Variable differential lock ensures optimal torque distribution. This specimen features Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for precision handling and a rigid chassis with zero structural fatigue. Maintained to an exacting standard, the vehicle shows no bolster wear, pristine exterior surfaces
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true specimen of automotive excellence, presented in flawless, showroom-ready condition. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster with a mirror-like finish, free of any stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium hand-stitched leather surfaces show no signs of wear, and the high-tech infotainment suite remains in perfect working order. This car has been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, featuring a complete service history from authorized dealerships. With its whisper-quiet engine and tight, responsive handling, it drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. For the buyer who demands perfection without the new-car depreciation, this is the ultimate find.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic, with its factory-original finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a turn-key investment in superior craftsmanship.
